name: Bounce Heroes
description: Bounce Heroes is a thrilling blend of idle RPG, merge puzzle, and roguelite action where your hero battles fierce monsters, an evil empire, and ancient beasts, all in pursuit of treasure and victory. Armed with a trusty crossbow and magical bouncy balls dropped by fallen foes, you’ll crush enemies wave after wave. Features * Idle RPG Power: Upgrade your hero to fight automatically while you reap the rewards * Merge & Drop Puzzle: Combine bouncy balls for powerful effects and break through deep layers to uncover hidden treasures * Roguelite Power-Ups: Choose from 3 unique cards each wave to boost your hero’s strength and abilities
instructions: Use the mouse to play the game
